name: Spicy Dip for Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Your Choice Of Veggies
- Place raisins in a small bowl and cover with hot tap water. Let stand for 10 minutes.
- Meanwhile, in a blender container, combine cottage cheese, vinegar, onion, chili powder, curry powder to taste, salt, and black pepper.
- Add drained, soaked raisins. Cover and blend at high speed until smooth and creamy.
- If necessary, add 1 tablespoon of water in which the raisins were soaked (or plain water) to achieve a good dipping consistency.
- Serve well chilled with a selection of vegetables such as cauliflower, carrot sticks, blanched green beans, radish roses, broccoli, celery sticks, zucchini sticks, or cooked artichokes.
